title: CBI Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Special Public Prosecutor Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: LLB, Enrollment Certificate as an Advocate with the Bar Council, Minimum 10 years experience at Bar in handling criminal matters in Sessions Courts
qualification.details: LLB with minimum 10 years standing as an Advocate with experience in handling criminal matters in Sessions Courts. Enrollment Certificate as an Advocate with the Bar Council.

salary_details.details: Rs. 7,500/- per case per day (effective hearing) for courts other than Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata and Chennai plus other entitlements as per DoPT order.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CBI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor recruitment is 29 May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Special Public Prosecutor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an LLB degree and have a minimum of 10 years of experience as an Advocate handling criminal matters in Sessions Courts, along with an Enrollment Certificate from the Bar Council.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Special Public Prosecutor position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Special Public Prosecutor is Rs. 7,500/- per case per day for effective hearings in courts outside Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, and Chennai, with additional entitlements as per DoPT orders.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Special Public Prosecutor role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Special Public Prosecutor position involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an interaction.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this CBI recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor recruitment through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Special Public Prosecutor position is contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Does the CBI provide any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or age relaxation details for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: The provided data indicates that there are 0 vacancies for the Special Public Prosecutor post in this recruitment drive.
